allow: Bash(find . -name '*.swift' -print0 | xargs -0 grep -l 'SolarManager\\.instance\(\)' | while IFS= read -r f; do sed -i '' 's/SolarManager\\.instance\(\)/SolarManager.shared/g' "$f"; done)
Bash(open -a Xcode && osascript -e 'tell application "Xcode" to activate' -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "r" using command down')

Bash(ARCHIVE_PATH="$HOME/Library/Developer/Xcode/Archives/$\(date '+%Y-%m-%d'\)/SolarLens_$\(date '+%H%M%S'\).xcarchive" && \\
xcodebuild -project SolarLens.xcodeproj \\
  -scheme "Solar Lens iOS" \\
  -configuration Release \\
  -archivePath "$ARCHIVE_PATH" \\
  -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' \\
  archive \\
  CODE_SIGN_STYLE=Automatic \\
  DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=UYT5K989XD 2>&1 | tail -5 && \\
echo "ARCHIVE_PATH=$ARCHIVE_PATH")

Bash(ARCHIVE_PATH="$HOME/Library/Developer/Xcode/Archives/$\(date '+%Y-%m-%d'\)/Solar Lens $\(date '+%d-%m-%Y, %H.%M'\).xcarchive" && \\
xcodebuild -project SolarLens.xcodeproj \\
  -scheme "Solar Lens iOS" \\
  -configuration Release \\
  -archivePath "$ARCHIVE_PATH" \\
  -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' \\
  archive \\
  CODE_SIGN_STYLE=Automatic \\
  DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=UYT5K989XD 2>&1 | tail -5 && \\
echo "ARCHIVE_PATH=$ARCHIVE_PATH")
